question: CSyD Defensa y Justicia vs. CA Vélez Sarsfield: Both Teams to Score
description:
In the upcoming Primera División Argentina game between CSyD Defensa y Justicia and CA Vélez Sarsfield, scheduled for February 13 at 8:15 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both CSyD Defensa y Justicia and CA Vélez Sarsfield each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on ligaprofesional.ar. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

question: Will the highest temperature in Seoul be -3°C or below on February 2?
description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Incheon Intl Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 2 Feb '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Incheon Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/kr/incheon/RKSI.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

question: XRP Up or Down - February 2, 6AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the XRP/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the XRP/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/XRP_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance XRP/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Ostrava Open, Qualification: Katherine Sebov vs Mona Barthel
description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Katherine Sebov and Mona Barthel in the Ostrava Open, Qualification, scheduled for February 1 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Sebov' if Katherine Sebov advances against Mona Barthel.

This market will resolve to 'Barthel' if Mona Barthel advances against Katherine Sebov.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Total Kills Over/Under 65.5 in Game 2?
description:

This market is about the total kills in Game 2.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 2 is 66 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

question: Map Handicap: RRQ (-1.5) vs Paper Rex (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Valorant match between Paper Rex and Rex Regum Qeon in the VCT Pacific Kickoff Playoffs, scheduled for January 31 at 5:10AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Rex Regum Qeon" if Rex Regum Qeon wins 2 or more maps than Paper Rex in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Paper Rex".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.
groupItemTitle: Map Handicap: RRQ (-1.5) vs Paper Rex (+1.5)

question: Mavericks vs. Rockets: O/U 219.5
description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for January 31 at 8:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if the Mavericks and Rockets combine to score 220 or more points in this game.

If the combined total is less than 220, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

question: Total Kills Over/Under 24.5 in Game 3?
description:
In the upcoming match between JD Gaming and Anyone's Legend in the LPL Group Ascend, scheduled for January 31 at 4:00AM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 3.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 3 is 25 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 3 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 3 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 3 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

events.title: LoL: JD Gaming vs Anyone's Legend (BO3) - LPL Group Ascend
events.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between JD Gaming and Anyone's Legend in the LPL Group Ascend, scheduled for January 31 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "JD Gaming" if JD Gaming win the match against Anyone's Legend.

This market will resolve to "Anyone's Legend" if Anyone's Legend win the match against JD Gaming.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/leagueoflegends/Main_Page.

question: Set 1 Winner: Sebov vs Barthel
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Katherine Sebov and Mona Barthel in the Ostrava Open, Qualification, scheduled for February 1 2026.
This market will resolve to “Sebov” if Katherine Sebov wins the first set. It will resolve to “Barthel” if Mona Barthel wins the first set.

description:

This market will resolve to "K27" if K27 win the match against WHITEBIRD.

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - February 2, 9AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Sonay Kartal and Aliaksandra Sasnovich in the Mubadala Abu Dhabi Open, Qualification, scheduled for February 1 2026.

This event is for the CBB game between Belmont Bruins and UIC Flames on February 6 at 9:00 PM ET.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.

If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

question: Spread: LIU Sharks (-2.5)
description:
In the upcoming CBB game, scheduled for January 31 at 2:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "LIU Sharks" if the LIU Sharks win the game by 3 or more points.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Central Connecticut State Blue Devils". 

The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
